brief: US-Iran tensions escalate with deadly attacks in Jordan, severe storms batter the Northeast, and political shifts in Hungary and the UK dominate headlines. Meanwhile, research explores AI's impact on writing, multimodal visualization, and human-robot interaction.
news_summary: Two US troops were killed and one is missing after Iranian attacks in Jordan, while severe thunderstorms and flooding hit the Northeast. Hungary's president resigned amid a constitutional crisis, and UK politics saw controversial remarks at CPAC and a shift on digital ID plans.
papers_summary: Studies examine how ChatGPT affects rhetorical moves in personal statements and the role of drawing in children's writing. Other papers explore AI coding agents' security risks and authoring narrative visualizations in sports videos.

en.brief: US-Iran tensions escalate with deadly attacks in Jordan, severe storms batter the Northeast, and political shifts in Hungary and the UK dominate headlines. Meanwhile, research explores AI's impact on writing, multimodal visualization, and human-robot interaction.
en.news_summary: Two US troops were killed and one is missing after Iranian attacks in Jordan, while severe thunderstorms and flooding hit the Northeast. Hungary's president resigned amid a constitutional crisis, and UK politics saw controversial remarks at CPAC and a shift on digital ID plans.
en.papers_summary: Studies examine how ChatGPT affects rhetorical moves in personal statements and the role of drawing in children's writing. Other papers explore AI coding agents' security risks and authoring narrative visualizations in sports videos.

zh.brief: 世界盃決賽阿根廷對西班牙即將上演，梅西的傳奇地位再成焦點；同時，經期追蹤App的隱私風險引發關注。研究方面，ChatGPT對寫作的影響成為熱點。
zh.news_summary: 世界盃決賽阿根廷與西班牙爭冠，獎金高達5000萬美元；梅西、馬拉多納、貝利誰是最強引發熱議。此外，經期追蹤App的數據隱私漏洞令人擔憂。
zh.papers_summary: 多篇研究探討AI對寫作的影響，如ChatGPT修改個人陳述的修辭效果，以及AI編碼代理被惡意指令利用的風險。

todays_image.caption: The silent keys of a vintage typewriter echo the new, unseen pressures being typed into Jordan's role as a strategic buffer in the U.S.-Iran conflict.
todays_image.source_name: National Museum of African American History and Culture
todays_image.title: Underwood typewriter and case
